messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open; WARN-WRE-077 and REN-WRE-077 do not override the exact delegation match.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All required elements (vendor, class, term, ceiling, signature) present and closed in DEL-WRE-077 prior to 2026-06-28 action date.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: Action may proceed. DEL-WRE-077 provides exact closed boundary match for vendor, term, ceiling USD 50000 and pre-release signature. Amount 49750 falls below ceiling; policy confirms no committee review needed. Source boundary is closed.

internal_documents.content: Renewal REN-WRE-077 extends Wren Services support for 12 months at USD 50750.
Committee-warning note WARN-WRE-077 says renewals near USD 50000 should verify delegation ceiling before release.
Delegation DEL-WRE-077 authorizes Wren Services support renewal, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, signed 2026-06-27 before release.

policy_documents.content: Near-threshold renewal is complete when delegation authority matches vendor, renewal class, term, amount ceiling, and signature date before release. Committee review is not required below the amount ceiling.
